title: WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM REGIONAL HOUSING CENTER WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides grant funding for measures that help reduce energy costs, such as insulation, furnace repairs, health and safety repairs, and refrigerator replacement. 125 N 17th Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Homeowners and renters with household incomes no higher than 60% of statewide median income Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 366-6589 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (808) 404-3511 Reception (800) 404-3511 Ext: 2018 Toll-free Intake (503) 366-6589 Jennifer White Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Columbia, and Tillamook Counties Services: Refrigerators Weatherization Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM REGIONAL HOUSING CENTER
